description: A backend/export capability becoming a visible report action should be treated as local UI ambiguity.
message: Add export button to the existing report page

spec.core_task: Export the currently visible report data
spec.first_visual_focus: Report title, active filters, and export action

user_flow.feedback: Button shows loading, then download starts or an inline error appears

spec.layout_strategy: Report toolbar action aligned with active filters
implementation_constraints: Do not change report table columns
acceptance_criteria: Export action is visually associated with the active report filters
Loading and error feedback appear without shifting the report table
